Length: 49
Moves: 02-32-35 72-42-45 05-16-05 57-37-36 16-52-74 42-24-54 20-64-20 24-13-22 32-14-03 13-43-13 14-23-34 75-55-65 23-24-26 50-51-62 24-23-24 43-33-30 52-61-52 51-21-10 27-16-27 37-77-75 64-42-31 21-12-21 42-64-42 33-32-33 61-50-51 32-41-40 23-14-32 55-44-53 64-55-56 12-01-23 50-61-50 77-37-77 16-17-16 01-00-01 55-66-55 37-57-67 61-72-63 44-43-44 14-15-14 00-11-02 72-73-64 57-37-57 66-76-66 37-46-37 15-06-07 46-47-46 06-15-04 11-00-11 15-25-15
